name: public-site
title: 前台站点
creator: hobr
notes: Implemented public SSR site routes (/ , /events, /events/[id], /submit), public APIs (/api/submit, /api/cities, /api/tags), sitemap.xml, M3 public styles, Svelte islands, Turnstile verification wrapper, geo city resolution, public D1 queries, and docs/dev seed data. Validation: generate-types, tsc --noEmit, lint, astro build --outDir .tmp-build-public-site-final, local D1 seed/query checks, HTTP route checks for home/list/detail/offline/pending/sitemap/apis. Local successful submission could not be completed because workerd rejected Turnstile TLS certificate chain in this environment; API now returns clear 502 for verification request failure.
